name: academorix/audit
purpose: Compliance-grade audit trail — thin wrapper around owen-it/laravel-auditing with KMS encryption, tenant scoping, 365d hot + 7y cold retention.
capabilities: HasAudit trait aliasing owen-it's Auditable bundle
Audit model with BelongsToTenantOptional + ULID prefix aud_
KMS-encrypted old/new values for restricted-tier fields
when_to_use: A model records compliance-material changes that regulators and DPOs need to prove happened.
when_not_to_use: For user-facing who-did-what feeds with tier retention, use academorix/activity.
